name: consumer_social_product_mismatch
description: Pure consumer/social product PM role — Aakash has no consumer experience. Should score Medium or Low.

job.title: Senior Product Manager — Social Feed
job.full_description: Meta is hiring a Senior PM for the Facebook News Feed team. You will own ranking algorithms, creator monetisation, and consumer engagement features for 2 billion daily active users. Requirements: 5+ years PM experience in consumer social products, deep understanding of recommendation systems, experience with A/B testing at massive scale (billions of users), consumer psychology and engagement metrics. We sponsor H-1B visas. Must have shipped features to 100M+ users.
